title: Pigeon Post
description: Pigeon Post is a minecraft mod that adds Pigeons and Birdhouses to minecraft.
body:
This mod wasn't made by me though (except the title image) all credit goes to "**_corgi_in_tights_**" for doing the coding and "**_THE_(Irish)_MAN1!_**" and "**_reider_**" for making the models and textures. Also credits to the rest of **_SteveTopia_** team for coming up with the ideas for this mod.

More info to the mod on **_CurseForge_**.

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pigeon-post
